name: ZipCheckup U.S. Water Quality Dataset
description: Water quality violations, lead/copper levels, radon zones, CCR data, anomaly detection, and composite Home Safety Scores for U.S. ZIP codes. Based on EPA SDWIS, CCR, ECHO, and state agency data.
primary_source: U.S. EPA Safe Drinking Water Information System (SDWIS)
additional_sources: State environmental agencies (CA, NJ, MA, NH, VT, CT, HI, NM)

files.zipcheckup-water-quality.csv: Main dataset — 29K+ ZIPs with violations, lead/copper, scores (CSV)
files.zipcheckup-water-quality.json: Main dataset — same as CSV in JSON array format
files.ccr-enriched.csv: Consumer Confidence Report data — 10,011 ZIPs, 1,062 systems (CSV)
files.state-mcl-crossref.json: State MCL crossref — 201 comparisons, 22 systems failing stricter state limits (JSON)
files.anomalies.json: Anomaly detection — 11,908 anomalies across 9 types in 29K+ ZIPs (JSON)
files.l3-metrics.csv: L3 composite metrics — lead exposure probability, maintenance debt, compliance risk, energy burden, flood cost for 39K+ ZIPs (CSV)
files.zipcheckup-metadata.json: This file — dataset summary and field documentation

main_dataset_fields.lead_level_mg_l: 90th percentile lead level (mg/L), null if no data
main_dataset_fields.copper_level_mg_l: 90th percentile copper level (mg/L), null if no data
main_dataset_fields.radon_zone: EPA radon zone (1=highest, 3=lowest), null if no data
main_dataset_fields.home_safety_score: Composite score 0-100, null if insufficient data
main_dataset_fields.health_contaminant_names: Semicolon-separated list of health-based contaminant names
main_dataset_fields.ccr_contaminant_count: Number of contaminants reported in Consumer Confidence Report (CCR), null if no CCR data
main_dataset_fields.ccr_violation_count: Number of violations reported in CCR, null if no CCR data
main_dataset_fields.enforcement_action_count: Total EPA/state enforcement actions against the water system
main_dataset_fields.enforcement_health_violations: Number of health-based violations from enforcement records
main_dataset_fields.has_active_issues: Whether the system has currently active enforcement or violation issues (true/false)
main_dataset_fields.boil_water_advisories: Number of boil water advisories issued
